title: Find the missing number (add and subtract within 100)
description: Practice solving problems where you have to figure out the missing value in an addition or subtraction equation. All numbers are within 100.
topic_path: Find the missing number (add and subtract within 100)

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number makes this equation true?**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve.*

$45 +{} $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]] $=81$  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c231be5750c22a76c5a2f8c6f64b31424b34e829)
hints:
We can think of addition as the following:

$\blueE{\text{part}}+\goldE{\text{ part}} = \maroonD{\text{total}}$

Let's keep adding to $\blueE{45}$ until we have a total of $\maroonD{81}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/19aadc6e84e2911130d94fc56cd9f2f4f0ff407d)

$\blueE{45} + \goldE{\Box} = \maroonD{81}$

We added $\goldE{36}$ more blocks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e8daf671b02195e8a146acaf77560754c4d56187)

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number makes this equation true?**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve.*

 [[☃ numeric-input 1]] ${}-  9=72$  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f9c7ec7b35c798bdb855bb6c4c5de6d720edec81)
hints:
We can think of subtraction as:

$\maroonD{\text{total}} - \blueE{\text{part}} = \goldE{\text{ part}}$

We can relate subtraction to addition:

$\maroonD{\text{total}} = \blueE{\text{part}} + \goldE{\text{ part}}$

So, we can add $\blueE9$ to $\goldE{72}$ to find the $\maroonD{\text{total}}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/78b3b973042e9cf1707a18b42b4f5a22dd4f9b3f)

There are $\maroonD{81}$ blocks. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d8e5f2526532275dfcf48238be8b0c9b81211581)
